name: Comparison table

en.when_to_use: Use it when several options need side-by-side comparison against the same capabilities, prices, or quality metrics, especially for pricing tiers, product selection, vendor evaluation, and feature matrices. It is a read-only display component. Use a data grid or dedicated interactive component instead when cells must be edited, large record sets filtered, or a selection returned to AI.
en.why_valuable: AI-written comparison tables often transpose the data axes, omit sticky headers or the first column, and mix Boolean and text semantics; dark themes and recommended-column highlighting also distort easily. This template uses a small feature-major contract to handle groups, true/false/partial states, text, 0-5 ratings, and horizontal scrolling on narrow screens.

data_in.note: data is a feature-major comparison matrix: items defines the option columns in the header, features defines the metric rows, and cells[featureIndex][itemIndex] is the corresponding cell. features.length must equal cells.length, and each cells row should have items.length entries. kind defaults to text; bool accepts true, false, or the string 'partial'; rating accepts numbers from 0-5. Missing values, null, and empty strings display as an em dash. highlight:true can mark zero or one recommended option; multiple highlighted options render but are usually discouraged.

schema.title?: string -- table title; displays "Comparison" when omitted
schema.items: {name:string,note?:string,highlight?:boolean}[] -- horizontal options; name is the primary label, note is a short description, and highlight:true adds an accent column and Recommended badge
schema.features: {label:string,group?:string,kind?:'bool'|'text'|'rating'}[] -- vertical metrics; adjacent identical group names merge into a visual group, and kind defaults to text
schema.cells: (boolean|'partial'|string|number|null)[][] -- feature-major matrix, indexed strictly as cells[featureIndex][itemIndex]

_cellSemantics.bool: true -> green ✓; false -> red ✗; 'partial' -> amber Partial; any other value -> em dash
_cellSemantics.text: string or number -> unchanged text; null, undefined, or an empty string -> em dash
_cellSemantics.rating: number 0-5 -> ★ + one decimal place (integers omit .0); out-of-range values are clamped to 0-5; non-number -> em dash

spec.note: Height grows with content; after the table body reaches 640px it scrolls internally so the header remains sticky. When width is insufficient, it scrolls horizontally and keeps the first column sticky. It uses no vh or percentage heights and does not measure the carrier.

when_to_use: 需要把多个方案按同一组能力、价格或质量指标横向比较时用它：尤其适合定价档位、产品选型、供应商评估和功能矩阵。它是只读展示组件；需要编辑单元格、筛选海量记录或向 AI 回传选择时应改用数据网格或专用交互组件。
why_valuable: AI 手写比较表常把数据轴转置、漏掉粘性表头/首列、混用布尔与文本语义，且深色主题和推荐列高亮容易失真；本模板用 feature-major 的小契约稳定处理分组、✓/✗/partial、文本、0–5 评分和窄屏横向滚动。

data_in.note: data 是 feature-major 比较矩阵：items 定义表头中的方案列，features 定义纵向指标行，cells[featureIndex][itemIndex] 是对应单元格。features.length 必须等于 cells.length；每个 cells 行应与 items.length 等长。kind 默认为 text；bool 接受 true、false 或字符串 'partial'；rating 接受 0–5 数字；缺失、null 和空字符串显示为 —。highlight:true 可用于零或一个推荐方案，多个也能渲染但通常不建议。

schema.title?: string —— 表格标题；省略时显示 “Comparison”
schema.items: {name:string,note?:string,highlight?:boolean}[] —— 横向方案；name 为主标签，note 为短说明，highlight:true 显示强调色列与 Recommended 标记
schema.features: {label:string,group?:string,kind?:'bool'|'text'|'rating'}[] —— 纵向指标；相邻且同名的 group 合并为视觉分组，kind 默认 text
schema.cells: (boolean|'partial'|string|number|null)[][] —— feature-major 二维矩阵，严格按 cells[featureIndex][itemIndex] 取值

_cellSemantics.bool: true → 绿色 ✓；false → 红色 ✗；'partial' → 琥珀色 Partial；其他值 → —
_cellSemantics.text: string 或 number → 原样文本；null、undefined 或空字符串 → —
_cellSemantics.rating: number 0–5 → ★ + 一位小数（整数不补 .0）；越界值夹到 0–5；非数字 → —

spec.note: 按内容增高，表体最高 640px 后内部滚动以保持粘性表头；宽度不足时横向滚动且首列粘住。无 vh/百分比高度，也不依赖载体尺寸测量。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified
